flavor.en: It has a secret, devastating move. It rubs its blazing fur together to cause huge explosions.

text.en: Discard 3 {R} Energy cards attached to Typhlosion in order to use this attack. Do 20 damage to each Benched Pokémon (yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
When you play Typhlosion from your hand, you may flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for up to 4 {R} Energy cards and attach them to Typhlosion. Shuffle your deck afterward.
